children.text: Automatically set wallpaper to the MOST RECENT NASA image
Use address, city, state or zip code for location services
Always try to use GPS for location services
Cycle through top level launcher menu button images
Play NASA TV streams outside this app (i.e., in Android browser)
Show titles on image thumbnails view
Show mission countdown in short format (D:H:M:S)

Use alternate streams for NASA TV and ISS Live
